roleDescriptions.Villager: No powers -- just your vote and your wits. Win when every werewolf is gone.
roleDescriptions.Werewolf: Each night, vote with the pack to kill. Win once wolves equal or outnumber the rest.
roleDescriptions.Seer: Each night, learn if one player is a werewolf or not -- nothing more.
roleDescriptions.Doctor: Each night, protect one player from the werewolves' kill.
roleDescriptions.Witch: One heal potion, one poison potion, each usable once per game.
roleDescriptions.Hunter: If you die, fire one revenge shot at another living player before you go.
roleDescriptions.Cupid: On night one, pair two players as lovers -- if one dies, so does the other.
roleDescriptions.Tanner: Win alone if the village lynches you. Any other death is just a death.

privacy.label: Room privacy
privacy.note: Every room is public for now — anyone can find it in Join Room.

home.noOpenVillages: No open villages right now. Create one.

errors.joinFailed: Could not join that room. Check the code and try again.

objectives.tanner: Get yourself lynched by the village.

banner.lobbyStatus: Waiting for everyone to ready up.
banner.votingStatus: Choose who to send to the gallows.
banner.hunterStatus: The Hunter may take one soul down with them.

witchInfo.targeted: The werewolves are coming for {{name}} tonight.
witchInfo.unknown: You don't know who the werewolves targeted tonight.

cupidHint.pickSecond: First love chosen: {{name}}. Pick the second.

phaseAnnouncement.dayDiscussion: ☀️ Day discussion is open. Chat is visible to everyone.
phaseAnnouncement.night: 🌙 Night has fallen. The village sleeps.
phaseAnnouncement.voting: ⚖️ Voting is open — cast your suspicion.

roleGuide.title: Role Guide
roleGuide.loadFailed: Couldn't load role descriptions. Try again later.

join.title: 1. Gather Your Village
join.look: The Home screen — create a new village, or enter a 6-character code to join one that already exists.
join.do: Type a display name. Then tap Gather a New Village, or enter a code under Join Room and tap Enter Village.

lobby.title: 2. Wait in the Lobby
lobby.look: The player grid shows everyone who has joined so far, and who's already marked Ready.
lobby.do: Tap Ready Up once you're set. The host starts the game once everyone's ready (or force-starts it if that's allowed).

role.title: 3. Learn Your Secret Role
role.look: The Identity Grimoire card in the top-left corner — it starts face down when the game begins.
role.do: Tap the card to flip it and see your role and win condition. Keep it to yourself — that's the whole game.

night.title: 4. Night Falls
night.look: The phase banner turns to Night, and the action panel prompts whichever role is currently acting.
night.do: If you have a night power (Werewolf, Seer, Doctor, Witch, Cupid), tap a player on the grid to act. Everyone else just waits for morning.

day.title: 5. Day Discussion
day.look: The countdown clock in the phase banner, and the Public Square chat where everyone talks.
day.do: Make your case or share suspicions in the chat box before the clock runs out.

voting.title: 6. Cast Your Vote
voting.look: Vote counts appear on each living player's card as the votes come in.
voting.do: Tap a player (or Abstain) to pick your vote, then tap Submit Vote before the countdown ends.

gameOver.title: 7. Game Over
gameOver.look: The results screen reveals every player's true role and which side won.
gameOver.do: Check View full game log to relive what happened, or tap Rematch to play again in the same room.

castVote.title: Cast this vote?
castVote.message: Vote to lynch {{name}}? You can change your vote until voting closes.

hunterShoot.title: Take your revenge shot?
hunterShoot.message: Fire on {{name}}? This cannot be undone.

hunterPass.title: Pass on your revenge shot?
hunterPass.message: You will not fire on anyone. This cannot be undone.

seerInspect.title: Inspect this player?
seerInspect.message: Learn whether {{name}} is a werewolf? This uses your action for the night.

werewolfAttack.title: Attack this player?
werewolfAttack.message: Vote with the pack to kill {{name}} tonight?

werewolfPass.title: Pass on tonight's kill?
werewolfPass.message: The pack will not kill anyone tonight.

doctorProtect.title: Protect this player?
doctorProtect.message: Protect {{name}} from the werewolves tonight? This uses your action for the night.

witchHeal.title: Use your heal potion?
witchHeal.message: Save tonight's target from the werewolves? This potion can only be used once.

witchPoison.title: Use your poison potion?
witchPoison.message: Poison {{name}}? This potion can only be used once.

witchPass.title: Pass your turn?
witchPass.message: End your turn without using another potion tonight.

cupidPair.title: Confirm these lovers?
cupidPair.message: Pair {{first}} and {{second}} as lovers? If one dies, so does the other. This cannot be undone.
